calendarNotes:
Guilford County Schools begins the 2026-2027 school year on August 24, 2026, and the school year ends June 10, 2027. Spring Break runs March 22–26, 2027. GCS shares the same August 24 start date as Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools, but spring breaks do not overlap: CMS breaks March 29–April 2, meaning the two districts have no common break window in 2026-2027. Families with children in both districts, or those coordinating childcare and travel across the two systems, should pick one break window and plan around it — they will not coincide.

Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools spring break timing differs from GCS each year and is not guaranteed to align. Families in GCS with relatives or friends attending WSFC schools should verify WSFC's official calendar before booking any shared spring travel. The Piedmont Triad's three school systems — GCS, WSFC, and Alamance-Burlington — each set spring break independently, and stagger years are common.

Thanksgiving break in 2026-2027 runs Wednesday through Friday, November 25–27, with students returning Monday, November 30. Winter break begins December 21 — one day earlier than the previous school year — and students return January 4, 2027. The earlier winter break start gives families slightly more lead time for holiday travel but compresses the window between Thanksgiving and winter break to approximately three and a half weeks.
